name: GALLERY
description: Minimal editorial art direction (WP21 proposal C). Restrained near-monochrome palette with a single vermilion accent. Content-first, gallery-quality. Single source of truth for AssetGenerator, ImageQualityChecker and SWIZZLE_JSON_SPEC.md.
rendering: flat vector, clean thin or no outline, no drop shadow, minimal shading, generous negative space
shapeLanguage: confident simple silhouettes, clean flat geometric shapes with calm proportions — not cute-overloaded, not busy, not gradient-heavy

background.style: Minimal editorial: warm off-white (#FAFAF7) or deep ink field, optional faint baseline grid or a single thin rule line, vast negative space. At most one small accent shape in a corner. Calm, premium, museum-wall mood.
background.centerPolicy: Center MUST stay completely open and uncluttered (game sprites are overlaid on top).

promptFragments.objectStyle: Single game object on pure white (#FFFFFF). Bold simple flat silhouette, near-monochrome (ink #111111 on white) with a selective vermilion (#FF3B1F) accent on ONE key detail. Clean thin or no outline, no shadow, lots of breathing room. Large, centered, single object, no scene. Iconic and confident, gallery-quality.
promptFragments.backgroundStyle: Minimal editorial background: warm off-white (#FAFAF7) or deep ink field, optional faint baseline grid or a single thin rule line, vast negative space. Center completely open. At most one small vermilion (#FF3B1F) accent shape in a corner. Calm, premium, museum-wall mood.
promptFragments.negative: NOT busy, NOT neon, NOT cute-overloaded, NOT gradient-heavy. No rainbow / multi-hue palettes, no photorealistic texture, no drop shadows, no text or labels, no multi-element scene.
